mapper.select: SELECT po.id, po.order_no, po.supplier_id, s.supplier_name, po.operator_id, u.real_name AS operator_name, po.total_amount, po.status, po.remark, po.created_at FROM purchase_order po INNER JOIN supplier s ON po.supplier_id = s.id INNER JOIN sys_user u ON po.operator_id = u.id ORDER BY po.id DESC

SELECT po.id, po.order_no, po.supplier_id, s.supplier_name, po.operator_id, u.real_name AS operator_name, po.total_amount, po.status, po.remark, po.created_at FROM purchase_order po INNER JOIN supplier s ON po.supplier_id = s.id INNER JOIN sys_user u ON po.operator_id = u.id WHERE po.id = #{id}
